title: Session
description: Internal session persistence model. Defines what is stored in the session backend (e.g. SQLite).

id.description: Canonical session identifier. UUID v4 when generated by the engine; caller-provided string when create_if_missing=true.

profile_name.description: Name of the profile used when this session was created.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Write format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.ffffff+00:00 (microseconds, explicit UTC offset). Implementations must write this exact format for cross-implementation interoperability. See behavior/session-lifecycle.md.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Updated on every save. Same format as created_at.

turns.description: Ordered list of conversation turns. Append-only in practice.

metadata.description: Arbitrary caller-provided session metadata. Stored as JSON.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at turn creation. Same format as Session.created_at.
